problem: What enzyme or organism efficiently degrades all plastic types at scale?
mechanism: Two-dimensional material stacking (van der Waals heterostructure)
hypothesis: If Two-dimensional material stacking (van der Waals heterostructure) is applied to types, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Synthesis and characterization with 8 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
